description: Style NoteUp the style factor of your casual staples with this pair of flats from portia. Designed for optimum comfort but fashioned to work high-street fashion into your look, we recommend styling this for laidback cool.Product DetailsYellow thong style upper with a midfoot strap and an ankle loopSoft, brown footbedTough outsole with an upraised heel and grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
